level_signals: 5+ years of product management or related industry experience
Proven track record of building for developers
Experience collaborating directly and deeply with high-growth tech companies

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 5+ years of product management or related industry experience.
Proven track record of building for developers, with strong intuition for designing clear, flexible APIs and primitives that scale from early experimentation to production use.
Have experience collaborating directly and deeply with high-growth tech companies.
Have hands-on experience driving consensus and action in ambiguous spaces.
Excel at collaborating across diverse teams and communicating complex ideas clearly.

scope.surface: Agentic infrastructure and developer products for the OpenAI API (SDKs, APIs, primitives for building agent applications)
scope.business_model: developer-facing API platform, B2B and B2D
primary_metrics_inferred: Developer adoption of agentic APIs and SDKs
Speed and reliability of agent builder workflows
core_responsibilities: Deeply understand problems faced by agent builders and identify opportunities where products and models can make building agents faster, more intuitive, more reliable, and more powerful
Define strategic priorities and roadmap for improving agentic infrastructure for API users
Partner with research and engineering teams at a technical level to translate priorities into developer products and features (SDKs, APIs, and more)
Deliver quickly while maintaining a high bar for product quality and user experience

green_flags: Clear product surface with specific ownership (agentic infrastructure for API users)
High-visibility role at a leading AI company working directly on developer-facing agentic products
Close collaboration with research and engineering teams signals technical depth of role
red_flags: Visa sponsorship not mentioned; unclear for international candidates
Role is onsite in San Francisco only — no remote option indicated
JD requirements section uses 'You might thrive in this role if you:' framing, which makes hard vs. soft distinction ambiguous for all listed requirements

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 5+ years requirement and role scope)

location.type (inferred as onsite from 'This position is based in San Francisco, CA'; no hybrid or remote language present)
